violations.text: Labeled sushi was observed cooling in inadequate equipment (display case). Sushi was relocated to the freezer and cooled down to 41 F or below within 4 hours. Sushi was observed cooled to 36-37 at time of inspection Firm must have cold holding equipment with enough capacity to meet the cooling demands of the operation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Establishment is using time as a public health control for hot food (fried shrimp sumai, terryaki chicken bowls, dumplings, spring rolls, and crab rangoons) without prior approval. Establishment is currently filling out time logs. Establishment must request approval to use time as a public health control or discontinue using time as a public health control. An application was given to the person in charge at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025
